positive: A stunning, high-contrast celestial tapestry featuring interconnected mythological fauna and botanical elements. The central subject is a stylized Lunar Moth with iridescent wings, surrounded by geometric constellations, glowing etherial flora, and spiraling nebulae. Use a bold, graphic style reminiscent of psychedelic Art Deco and woodcut linocut printing. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and highly detailed, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes for maximum print scalability. Color palette limited to deep indigo, glowing cyan, metallic gold foil accents, and stark white highlights. Isolated on a neutral background, suitable for direct apparel application. Minimalist depth, maximum visual impact.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low detail, watermark, text, signature, graffiti, noise, grain, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, messy composition, photographic, photorealism, logo, trademark
